items.headline: Applied Materials Tampines Campus Expansion Tests AI Growth And Rich Valuation
items.summary: Applied Materials has launched a new $500 million Tampines Campus in Singapore, expanding global manufacturing and R&D capacity. The facility more than doubles the company’s advanced cleanroom space to support rising AI driven semiconductor equipment demand. The campus incorporates advanced automation, AR/VR training tools, autonomous robots, and zero water waste systems. Applied Materials, ticker NasdaqGS:AMAT, enters this expansion phase with its stock trading at $567.25. The share price...
